preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role_module WHERE system_role_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Principal Investigator') AND system_module_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_module WHERE name = 'ProjectView')

column.name: system_role_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Principal Investigator')

delete.where: system_role_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Principal Investigator') AND system_module_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_module WHERE name = 'ProjectView')
